name: C WorldWide Asien KL
summary: C WorldWide Asien KL is an open ended equity mutual fund launched by Carnegie Kapitalforvaltning AS. The fundis managed by C WorldWide Asset Management Fondsmaeglerselskab A/S. The fund invests in public equity markets of Asia excluding Japan. It invests in stocks of companies operating across diversified sectors. The fund seeks to track the performance of its portfolio against the MSCI Asia excluding Japan index. C WorldWide Asien KL was formed on July 12, 2006 and is domiciled in Denmark.
